messages.content:
Mode: teaching_vocab

Question 1 of 3

Now ask your question simply and clearly. Use EXACTLY this format: "Question 1 of 3\n\nWhat does كِتَابٌ mean?"

IMPORTANT: DO NOT include the transliteration or English translation in your question. Keep it simple and wait for the student's answer.

Question 1 of 3

What does كِتَابٌ mean?

Mode: teaching_vocab

Question 2 of 3

Now ask your question simply and clearly. Use EXACTLY this format: "Question 2 of 3\n\nWhat does مَدْرَسَةٌ mean?"

IMPORTANT: DO NOT include the transliteration or English translation in your question. Keep it simple and wait for the student's answer.

Question 2 of 3

What does مَدْرَسَةٌ mean?

Mode: teaching_vocab

Question 3 of 3

Now ask your question simply and clearly. Use EXACTLY this format: "Question 3 of 3\n\nWhat does قَلَمٌ mean?"

IMPORTANT: DO NOT include the transliteration or English translation in your question. Keep it simple and wait for the student's answer.

Question 3 of 3

What does قَلَمٌ mean?
